title: polypodium ryanii
intro: Polypodium ryanii, also known as the Resurrection Fern, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Polypodium ryanii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems.
